metadata.original_prompt: Create a summary of the project architecture and save it as a text file in my Downloads/shinobu directory.

tasks.title: Read project architecture details
tasks.description: Gather information about the current project's architecture, including components, structure, dependencies, and design principles.

tasks.title: Summarize project architecture
tasks.description: Condense the gathered architectural information into a clear, concise summary highlighting key aspects such as modules, data flow, technology stack, and scalability considerations.

tasks.title: Save summary to text file
tasks.description: Write the generated summary into a new text file located at '~/Downloads/shinobu/summary.txt'.
